title: Broccoli Wrap
description: A simple and healthy wrap filled with steamed broccoli and crunchy peanuts. Perfect for a quick snack or light meal.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
2. Add 1-2 tablespoons of water to the pan and cover with a lid.
3. Steam the broccoli for 3-4 minutes until tender but still crisp.
4. Meanwhile, toast the wrap in the pan for a few seconds until lightly browned.
5. Assemble the wrap by placing the steamed broccoli in the center.
6. Sprinkle chopped peanuts on top of the broccoli.
7. Fold the wrap in half to enclose the filling.
